gitCommit.subject: v1.9.0: Full platform review — 17 fixes across security, CI, UI, code quality
gitCommit.body:
v1.9.0: Full platform review — 17 fixes across security, CI, UI, code quality

Security (#105, #107, #108):
- Remove .env.test from git tracking, add .env.test.example
- CSP: unsafe-eval only in development, not production
- Billing: validate redirect URLs to prevent open redirect attacks
- npm audit fix (21 remaining require --force)

CI (#119, #120, #121):
- Fix visual test circular JSON crash in afterAll
- Fix lunar return service test mocks (whereNull/whereNotNull chain)
- Fix lunar return controller tests (no longer uses service, uses knex directly)
- Fix @integration Playwright tag format

UI (#113, #115, #116):
- Swap LoginPage/RegisterPage/SynastryPage → *New variants (full UX)
- Fix Capricorn color #001f3f → #5dade2 (WCAG AA compliance)
- Mobile nav Home → /dashboard for authenticated users
- Sidebar/footer use CSS variables instead of hardcoded colors
- PWA manifest: 'AstroVerse' name + dark background_color
- Fix planet name typo: Uranium → Uranus

gitCommit.body:
v1.9.0: Full platform review — 17 fixes across security, CI, UI, code quality

Security (#105, #107, #108):
- Remove .env.test from git tracking, add .env.test.example
- CSP: unsafe-eval only in development, not production
- Billing: validate redirect URLs to prevent open redirect attacks
- npm audit fix (21 remaining require --force)

CI (#119, #120, #121):
- Fix visual test circular JSON crash in afterAll
- Fix lunar return service test mocks (whereNull/whereNotNull chain)
- Fix lunar return controller tests (no longer uses service, uses knex directly)
- Fix @integration Playwright tag format

UI (#113, #115, #116):
- Swap LoginPage/RegisterPage/SynastryPage → *New variants (full UX)
- Fix Capricorn color #001f3f → #5dade2 (WCAG AA compliance)
- Mobile nav Home → /dashboard for authenticated users
- Sidebar/footer use CSS variables instead of hardcoded colors
- PWA manifest: 'AstroVerse' name + dark background_color
- Fix planet name typo: Uranium → Uranus

v1.9.0: Full platform review — 17 fixes across security, CI, UI, code quality

Security (#105, #107, #108):
- Remove .env.test from git tracking, add .env.test.example
- CSP: unsafe-eval only in development, not production
- Billing: validate redirect URLs to prevent open redirect attacks
- npm audit fix (21 remaining require --force)

CI (#119, #120, #121):
- Fix visual test circular JSON crash in afterAll
- Fix lunar return service test mocks (whereNull/whereNotNull chain)
- Fix lunar return controller tests (no longer uses service, uses knex directly)
- Fix @integration Playwright tag format

UI (#113, #115, #116):
- Swap LoginPage/RegisterPage/SynastryPage → *New variants (full UX)
- Fix Capricorn color #001f3f → #5dade2 (WCAG AA compliance)
- Mobile nav Home → /dashboard for authenticated users
- Sidebar/footer use CSS variables instead of hardcoded colors
- PWA manifest: 'AstroVerse' name + dark background_color
- Fix planet name typo: Uranium → Uranus

gitCommit.subject: v1.9.0: Full platform review — 17 fixes across security, CI, UI, code quality
gitCommit.body:
v1.9.0: Full platform review — 17 fixes across security, CI, UI, code quality

Security (#105, #107, #108):
- Remove .env.test from git tracking, add .env.test.example
- CSP: unsafe-eval only in development, not production
- Billing: validate redirect URLs to prevent open redirect attacks
- npm audit fix (21 remaining require --force)

CI (#119, #120, #121):
- Fix visual test circular JSON crash in afterAll
- Fix lunar return service test mocks (whereNull/whereNotNull chain)
- Fix lunar return controller tests (no longer uses service, uses knex directly)
- Fix @integration Playwright tag format

UI (#113, #115, #116):
- Swap LoginPage/RegisterPage/SynastryPage → *New variants (full UX)
- Fix Capricorn color #001f3f → #5dade2 (WCAG AA compliance)
- Mobile nav Home → /dashboard for authenticated users
- Sidebar/footer use CSS variables instead of hardcoded colors
- PWA manifest: 'AstroVerse' name + dark background_color
- Fix planet name typo: Uranium → Uranus
